Precomputed L-moment lookup tables (internal)

Source: R/data.R
lmoment-tables.Rd

Reference tables consumed internally by the distribution-fitting routines. The *_LSpace objects delimit the feasible L-moment ratio support region of a distribution and back LRatio_check(). The *_InitValues tables map sampled L-moment ratios to good starting parameters for the numerical (L-BFGS-B) fit of the distributions that lack closed-form L-moments (Burr XII, Dagum, Exponentiated Weibull, Generalised Gamma), as used by fitlm_nc() and its relatives.

Format

  • LMom_LSpace: a data frame (17994 x 3) with columns L-CV, L-Skewness, Dist.

  • BurrXII_LSpace, Dagum_LSpace: sp::SpatialPolygonsDataFrame objects delimiting each distribution's L-ratio support polygon.

  • Burr_InitValues, Dagum_InitValues, ExpWeibull_InitValues, GG_InitValues: data frames with 8 columns (lambda_1, lambda_2, tau_3, tau_4, lcv, scale, shape1, shape2).

Developed by George Pouliasis.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
